struct RuntimeConfig {
    db_url: String,
    pool_size: u32,
}

static mut GLOBAL_CONFIG: Option<&'static RuntimeConfig> = None;

fn init_runtime(config: RuntimeConfig) {
    // BAD: Box::leak to create a 'static singleton
    let leaked: &'static RuntimeConfig = Box::leak(Box::new(config));
    unsafe {
        GLOBAL_CONFIG = Some(leaked);
    }
}

fn get_config() -> &'static RuntimeConfig {
    unsafe { GLOBAL_CONFIG.unwrap() }
}
